name: Sakura Sushi
description: Authentic Japanese sushi with a modern twist. Best known for our spicy tuna rolls and student lunch specials.

name: The Daily Grind
description: A cozy spot for coffee lovers and students. Quiet atmosphere, free Wi-Fi, and artisanal pastries.

name: Bubble Bliss
description: The best bubble tea in town! Wide variety of flavors and toppings. Try our signature brown sugar milk tea.

name: Iron Gym
description: 24/7 access gym with state-of-the-art equipment and personal training services.

name: Tech Hub Coworking
description: Modern coworking space for freelancers and startups. High-speed internet and meeting rooms available.

name: Green Grocer
description: Organic produce and local goods. Supporting local farmers since 2010.

name: Zen Yoga Studio
description: Find your inner peace with our variety of yoga and meditation classes.

name: The Burger Joint
description: Juicy burgers, crispy fries, and thick milkshakes. A local favorite for over 20 years.

name: Pet Paradise
description: Full-service pet grooming and daycare. We treat your pets like family.

name: Auto Care Experts
description: Reliable auto repair and maintenance. Specializing in all makes and models.

name: Library Cafe
description: Quiet reading nooks and great coffee. The perfect place to get lost in a book.

name: Fit & Fresh
description: Healthy meal prep and smoothies for the active lifestyle.
